title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: She conducted research on climate change.

questions.firstSentence: They had repaired the roof by the time it started raining.
questions.secondSentence: The roof had (1) _________ by the time it started raining.

questions.firstSentence: He is less organised than he used to be.
questions.secondSentence: He is not (1) _________ he used to be.

questions.firstSentence: The task was too complex for him to complete alone.
questions.secondSentence: The task wasn't (1) _________ for him to complete alone.

questions.firstSentence: She forced the children to go to bed at nine.
Despite the bad weather, the match continued.
questions.secondSentence: The match continued (1) _________ the weather was bad.

questions.firstSentence: The music was so loud that she probably didn't hear you.
questions.secondSentence: She probably didn't hear you (1) _________ the loud music.
